diagrams.title: Deletion-Contraction Algorithm Tree
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing how deletion-contraction breaks down chromatic polynomial calculation step by step
elements: Further branches until no edges remain
Leaf nodes: chromatic polynomials of basic graphs
diagrams.purpose: Visualize recursive decomposition of complex graphs into simpler components for polynomial calculation

diagrams.title: Chromatic Polynomial of Common Graphs
diagrams.description: Summary chart showing chromatic polynomials for fundamental graph families
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for common graph chromatic polynomials with formulas

diagrams.title: Evaluation of Chromatic Polynomial
diagrams.description: Graph showing P(G,k) values at different k and how chromatic number is determined
elements: y-axis: number of proper colorings P(G,k)
Points showing P(G,0)=0, P(G,1)=0 for G with edges
Marker at smallest k > 0 where P(G,k) > 0 labeled as χ(G)
diagrams.purpose: Understand relationship between chromatic polynomial and chromatic number visually
